messages.message:
Hi ,
Thanks for reaching out.
To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us:
 Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 How many units are you planning to purchase?
 Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?
嗨，
感谢您的联系。
为了帮您推荐合适的普拉提 reformer，您能告诉我们：
 您是为工作室、健身房或转售业务购买吗？
 你计划购买多少台？
 机器将运往哪个市场/国家？

Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:

你好，我是 Hesure Pilates 的 Johnny。

之前我们曾就普拉提设备有过联系，我想重新联系一下，看看你是否还在为你的商业寻找方案。

最近我们一直在与工作室经营者、分销商和设备经销商合作进行改革器设备的设置，所以我认为现在是回访你的好时机。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元
Hey send me the options again! Its for a pilates studio. I will probably buy sample first

Aluminum Reformer (AR011)
Most popular for new studios
Modern look, very durable, low maintenance
Strong commercial use

 Wooden Reformer (MR001)
Classic studio style
Good balance between cost and quality
Also widely used for studios
For a studio setup, these are the two models I’d recommend most:
I’ll send you real photos of both so you can compare
If you’re starting with a sample, most clients usually choose the aluminum model first.

I dont see cost?
我看不见成本？

For studio use, here are the sample prices:

用于工作室，以下是参考价格：

Aluminum Reformer (AR011): $1207 / unit
铝改造器（AR011）：1207 美元/单位
Wooden Reformer (MR001): $575 / unit ￼
木质改革者（MR001）：575 美元/单位

For most new studios, clients usually start with AR011 for the sample — it’s more aligned with modern studio setup and long-term use.

对于大多数新工作室，客户通常从 AR011 开始作为参考——它更符合现代工作室的设置和长期使用。

Yes, we also supply small accessories like yoga blocks, Pilates rings, ankle/wrist weights, and other studio essentials.

I can send you a full accessories list, or you can just tell me what items you’re looking for and I’ll match them for you
If you’re setting up a studio, I’d usually recommend matching it with the reformer so everything works together properly

This one is actually designed to be used together with the reformer, not usually purchased separately.

Are you looking to get it as part of the reformer setup, or do you want it separately?
